I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document covers the following products: 
• ARCTIC_ANALYSISFORECAST_PHY_TIDE_002_015, which is the real-time forecast of 
physical-tidal parameters in the Arctic.  
The product is produced by the Arctic Monitoring and Forecasting Centre (Arctic MFC) using the 
TOPAZ6 numerical prediction system and, with a focus on tides and storm surge, supplements 
the product ARCTIC_ANALYSIS_FORECAST_PHYS_002_001_a. The present product consists 
of the following elements:  
• Model: Nansen C enter’s version of HYCOM V2.2.98 coupled to the CICE v5.1 sea ice 
model. 
• Spatial resolution: horizontal = ~3 km, vertical = 50 hybrid z-isopycnal layers.  
• Time period for this CMEMS product: since November 2017. 
• Data assimilation: None so far. 
• Atmospheric for
